Name: FMovieSceneEditorData
Description: Editor only data that needs to be saved between sessions for editing but has no runtime purpose

Variables.Name: ExpansionStates
Variables.Description: Map of node path -> expansion state.

Variables.Name: WorkingRange
Variables.Description: User-defined working range in which the entire sequence should reside.

Variables.Name: ViewRange
Variables.Description: The last view-range that the user was observing
